overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxury shopping district in GTA V (Rockford Hills/Rodeo Drive area), starting at a city intersection, walking past the Anna Rex store, observing sports car traffic, and continuing through a cobblestone pedestrian alley with high-end retail buildings. The footage features enhanced graphics with ray tracing, showing palm-lined streets, distinctive architecture, and a fountain at the alley exit.

segments.scene_description: Walking down the narrow cobblestone alley between luxury storefronts, passing wooden benches and large planters. A pedestrian in a brown coat walks ahead in the same direction as the camera approaches a distinctive red brick tower.

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the alley toward a large building with a VINEWOOD sign, the camera passes outdoor seating with green umbrellas and approaches a stone fountain at the exit to a main street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sun-drenched city intersection into a secluded, high-end pedestrian alley. It begins at a crosswalk moving toward the Anna Rex luxury building, passing a parked blue sports car and palm trees under a clear blue sky. As the camera advances along the sidewalk, the scene shifts to observe a red sports car passing by and a large silver horse statue standing at the intersection ahead. The perspective then crosses the asphalt street and transitions onto a cobblestone path, moving between luxury storefronts, wooden benches, and a distinctive red brick tower. Finally, the camera glides past outdoor seating with green umbrellas and a building marked with a Vinewood sign before arriving at a stone fountain at the alley's exit.
